Design & UI.notes: Pretendard preserved. Accent #0066FF consistently used on rank 1 badge, progress bars, chart team-line, celebration CTA, challenge card, goalType badges. Desktop layout uses md:grid-cols-2 for My Score + Top 3 (verified: myX=148 width=480, topX=652 — clean side-by-side at 1280px). Mobile stacked layout preserved. Type badge rounded-full with bg-accent/10 text-accent — consistent across MemberCard, overall ranking, top3. No purple/gradient AI-slop patterns. 48px touch targets maintained.

Functionality.notes: 58/58 Playwright assertions pass. F1/F3/F5/F6/F7 regression all green (login, WebP upload + save + delete, reload persistence, bottom tab navigation). F2 radios render 3 options (체중/체지방량/골격근량), aria-checked flips, persisted with correct goalType per member. F4 overall ranking: 3 numbered rows sorted desc (Carol 100 > Alice 96 > Bob 10), current user row has border-accent with computed borderColor rgb(0,102,255). F10 modal fires on 0→100 transition only, displays name + type + current/target, canvas inserted by canvas-confetti, 확인 closes, celebratedMemberIds persists, no reopen on reload. F11 SVG + 7 weekday labels + empty state works. F12 create/progress/badge/delete-with-confirm all functional. 0 console errors.

Craft.notes: ConfirmDialog reused for both member and challenge deletion. Celebration modal: ESC + backdrop close handlers wired, 160ms fade-in, 확인 button 48px. 404 page with accent CTA back to /. Progress bar transition-all. WeeklyChart empty state styled consistently with other empty states. Minor: celebration reset policy on goalCurrent drop is documented but non-obvious UX choice (not negative).

Data Integrity.notes: persist version 1→2 migration verified with live localStorage seed (legacy {name,goalTarget,goalCurrent,goalUnit} → goalType:'weight' auto-injected, rank badge renders '체중'). partialize includes celebratedMemberIds and teamChallenge. removeMember cascades certifications + celebratedMemberIds. Score formulas unchanged (min(100, round(c/t*100)) + certs*10 verified via 96 = 86+10). Validation blocks target≤0 (preserved from Round 1). onRehydrateStorage defensively normalizes arrays.

non_blocking_issues: Bundle size > 500 kB after recharts (self-reported; does not affect runtime behavior).
Celebration reset-on-update policy (drop below 100 clears celebratedMemberIds) is documented in code but not visible to user — could surprise if goal is edited after achievement.
WeeklyChart tooltip behavior not interactively tested (recharts hover — skipped per spec).
pass_rationale: All 4 criteria meet or exceed thresholds (D&UI 9≥7, Func 9≥7, Craft 8≥6, Data 9≥7). 0 blocking issues. 58/58 Playwright assertions pass. 0 console errors across all pages. Round 1 regression clean.
